testcase.name: VerifyBiddingRound1NAFED

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.xpath: //div[@class="ps-2"]//span//img' (tried for 30 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval)
